info.title: B2B Delivery IQ API
info.description: Express API — auth (JWT), distributor products/stock, retailer catalog/cart/orders. Swagger UI: `/api/docs`.

servers.description: API base (same host as this server)

tags.name: Products
tags.description: Distributor catalog and stock (Bearer JWT, role=distributor)

tags.name: Retailer
tags.description: Catalog, cart, checkout, orders (Bearer JWT, role=retailer)

bearerAuth.description: JWT from POST /auth/login or /auth/register. Header: Authorization: Bearer followed by the token string.

patch.summary: Update product (catalog fields only; use stock endpoints for quantity)

put.summary: Add or update cart line (quantity 0 removes)

post.summary: Place orders (one per distributor); clears cart
